title: aspidium glabrum
intro: Aspidium glabrum, also known as the smooth maidenhair fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Dryopteridaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Aspidium glabrum include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory problems such as bronchitis and asthma. The herbal preparations of Aspidium glabrum include infusions, decoctions, and topical creams, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
